item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: ❓Seth Miller - Department of Retirement Systems
item.description: Seth Miller signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Department of Retirement Systems.

item.title: First reading, referred to Appropriations.
item.description: First reading, referred to Appropriations.

item.title: 👍💵James Cockburn - Washington Public Ports Association
item.description: James Cockburn signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Public Ports Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Jonalthan Eder signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Port of Vancouver, USA.

item.description: Jessica Garza signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Port of Pend Oreille.

item.title: APP - Majority; do pass.
item.description: APP - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.
item.description: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: Floor amendment(s) adopted.

item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.description: James Cockburn signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Public Ports Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Laurie Layne signed up to testify Pro.
